query:
INSERT INTO savedQuotes (
  quoteName, company, clientCompany, clientContact, clientAddress1, clientCity, clientState, clientZip, clientEmail,
  facilityId, selectedFacility, monthlyPallets, monthlyTurns, sqFtPerPallet, stackHeight,
  laborRate, taxRate, fullyLoadedLaborRate, inboundMinutes, outboundMinutes,
  storageMargin, handlingInMargin, handlingOutMargin, monthlyStorageMinimum,
  pickType, monthlyOrders, casesPerOrder, labelsPerOrder,
  casePickRate, layerPickRate, palletSupplyFee, shrinkWrapFee, labelingFee, orderProcessingFee, cancellationFee,
  casePickMargin, palletSupplyMargin, shrinkWrapMargin, labelingMargin, orderProcessingMargin, cancellationMargin,
  storageRateOverride, handlingInRateOverride, handlingOutRateOverride,
  quoteValidDays, paymentTerms, minimumCommitment, customDisclosures, freightLanes, createdBy
) VALUES (
  'Spiked Ade - Warehousing Proposal', 'L&M',
  'Spiked Ade (SPKED Inc)', 'Brad Moose', 'Fairfield', 'Fairfield', 'NJ', '07004', 'bmoose@spikedade.com',
  'pa-1151', 'pa-1151', 500, 1, 48, 2,
  18, 25, 2250, 5, 5,
  30, 30, 30, 8000,
  'full', 0, 0, 1,
  40, 30, 9, 4, 50, 10, 25,
  30, 30, 30, 30, 30, 30,
  16, 10, 10,
  30, 'Net 30 from receipt of invoice', '12 months',
  'Product: 12oz Sleek Can RTD (4.5% ABV). Min. Pallet Commitment: 500 pallets. Capacity available up to 3,500 pallets at these rates. Currently producing in Southern VT and Buffalo, NY. SOJO (Bristol) currently handles variety pack cartoning and is also their main storage facility. Pallet stackability: prefer 2 high but 3 high works. Order Processing Time: 48 hours from order receipt.',
  '[{"type":"outbound","origin":"L&M PA-1151 Bristol","destination":"SOJO Bristol","rate":250,"pallets":21,"weight":40000},{"type":"inbound","origin":"SOJO Bristol","destination":"L&M PA-1151 Bristol","rate":250,"pallets":21,"weight":40000}]',
  'j.stenson@summitskiesinc.com'
);
